# chore(codify): R1/R2/R3 institutional learnings — 12 patterns + CodeQL fixes

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `70ad8b65568e` — chore(codify): R1/R2/R3 institutional learnings — 12 patterns + CodeQL fixes

**Body**:

Codify phase for the arbor-upstream-fixes session. Captures 12
institutional patterns from the R1/R2/R3 red team into rules, skills,
and a CodeQL sanitizer model so the same failure modes cannot recur.

## Rule insertions (6 files, 305 lines)

- rules/security.md: new "Credential Decode Helpers" section — null-byte
  rejection at every decode site via shared helper, pre-encoder
  consolidation. Both MUST sub-clauses with BLOCKED phrases.
- rules/observability.md: new MUST Rule 6 "Mask Helper Output Forms" —
  mask failure sentinels distinct from masked output, mask form uniform
  (***@host) across all helpers. Renumbered existing Rule 6 to 7.
- rules/zero-tolerance.md: sub-clause 1a (scanner-surface symmetry —
  PR scan findings same as main) and 3a (typed delegate guards for
  None backing objects).
- rules/git.md: "Issue Closure Discipline" (close with commit ref) and
  "Pre-Commit Hook Workarounds" (document core.hooksPath bypass).
- rules/testing.md: behavioral regression tests over source-grep,
  verified numerical claims in session notes.
- rules/python-environment.md: MUST Rule 3 ([tool.uv.sources] for
  monorepo sub-packages) + strengthened Rule 2 BLOCKED list.

## Skill updates (4 files, 194 lines)

- NEW: skills/18-security-patterns/credential-url-handling.md (116 LOC)
  — canonical encode/decode/mask pipeline with CodeQL barrier docs.
- EDIT: skills/12-testing-strategies/SKILL.md (+25) — "Regression Test
  Design" section.
- EDIT: skills/31-error-troubleshooting/SKILL.md (+28) — "Git Hook
  Traps" subsection.
- EDIT: skills/spec-compliance/SKILL.md (+25) — "Spec Coverage Audit
  Cadence" section.

## CodeQL false-positive resolution (Layer 1 + 2 + 3)

Layer 1 — convert 3 availability probes to CodeQL-friendly patterns:
- state_manager.py: try/import sqlalchemy → importlib.util.find_spec
- async_sql.py: deleted genuinely unused OptimisticLockingNode import
- mongodb.py: removed TYPE_CHECKING block, used Optional[Any] with
  docstring-level type documentation

Layer 2 — custom CodeQL sanitizer model:
- NEW: .github/codeql/codeql-config.yml — wires sanitizer pack, scopes
  scan to src/ + packages/*/src/ (excludes tests/examples/build)
- NEW: .github/codeql/sanitizers/qlpack.yml + sanitizers.model.yml —
  declares mask_url and safe_log_value as summaryModel taint barriers
  (kind=value, not kind=taint) so CodeQL stops tracing taint through
  our sanitizer functions
- EDIT: .github/workflows/codeql.yml — uses config-file directive

Layer 3 — adapter log refactor:
- NEW: dataflow/utils/masking.py safe_log_value() helper — explicit
  sanitizer barrier for CodeQL taint analysis at log sites
- EDIT: postgresql.py, mysql.py — log self.host/port/database through
  safe_log_value() so CodeQL's taint chain terminates
- EDIT: factory.py — safe_log_value(db_type) alongside mask_url

## Proposal manifest (APPEND per artifact-flow.md)

Appended 21 new entries to .claude/.proposals/latest.yaml (was 51
entries from the convergence session). Reset status from reviewed to
pending_review per MUST "Reset Status on Append" — the 21 new entries
have not been classified by loom. The prior 51 entries and their
review metadata are preserved intact.

Also includes loom-side COC artifact updates:
- .claude/commands/codify.md — upstream codify command update
- .claude/rules/artifact-flow.md — proposal lifecycle documentation
  (3-state: pending_review → reviewed → distributed)
